title: helichrysum obtusum
intro: Helichrysum obtusum, also known as the rough-leaved helichrysum or the rough curry plant, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum obtusum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
